query: SELECT id, slug, LOCATE('table', content) as table_pos, LOCATE('Feasibility', content) as matrix_pos FROM articles WHERE slug LIKE '%classical-capex%' OR title LIKE '%Classical Capex%' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4BdfshR5KGD9QxB.4c622a7fca0a --database AZgbj2ZwAKxooAM5AQuEWd --execute SELECT id, slug, LOCATE('table', content) as table_pos, LOCATE('Feasibility', content) as matrix_pos FROM articles WHERE slug LIKE '%classical-capex%' OR title LIKE '%Classical Capex%' LIMIT 1;
